title: Web Agents
summary: Show how a browser-based agent can respond to a prompt with a demonstration video, revealed only after the participant presses Enter.
inputPlaceholder: Describe a web-based task for the agent.
examplesCaption: Choose a prompt, then press Enter to load the demonstration video from the beginning.
outputCaption: The YouTube link is stored in the data file for now, so it can be replaced later without changing the layout.

examplePrompts.label: Course search workflow
examplePrompts.prompt: Find three introductory AI courses for teachers, compare their learning outcomes, and summarize the main differences in a table.
